description.value:
Frequency once per day

You have a rudimentary artificial intelligence in your LFAN that you can activate to accelerate your LFAN-based activities. You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Quickened] for 1 minute. You can spend this extra action only to Strike with a weapon held in your LFAN, Interact with an object with your LFAN, or perform an action with the LFAN trait.

Special if you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Brawler LFAN] feat, you can spend this extra action to [[/act disarm]], [[/act grapple]], [[/act reposition]], [[/act shove]], or [[/act trip]].
